description: Verify GUI readiness: global settings, first-run onboarding, reusable settings updates, home-screen state snapshot, and user-facing documentation.

patterns: 默认秘书人设改为中性基线

command: set -euo pipefail; tmp=$(mktemp -d); trap 'rm -rf "$tmp"' EXIT; cp -a agent-system "$tmp/agent-system"; cp -a scripts "$tmp/scripts"; export DIGITAL_OFFICE_SYSTEM_HOME="$tmp/agent-system"; office="$tmp/agent-system/bin/office-system"; "$office" onboarding-options > "$tmp/options.json"; python3 -c 'import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); assert data["configured"] is False and "assistant_style" in data["presets"]["fields"]' "$tmp/options.json"; set +e; "$office" settings-status > "$tmp/status-empty.json" 2> "$tmp/status-empty.err"; code=$?; set -e; test "$code" -ne 0; "$office" onboarding-apply --assistant-style neutral_operator --address-style neutral --language auto --initiative-level confirm_before_action --pushback-style risk_based --approval-strictness balanced --memory-mode project_only --work-mode balanced --secretary-name 'Office Assistant' --confirmed > "$tmp/onboarding.json"; "$office" settings-update --work-mode quality --confirmed > "$tmp/settings.json"; python3 -c 'import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); assert data["source"] == "gui_settings_update" and data["choices"]["work_mode"] == "quality" and data["choices"]["approval_strictness"] == "balanced"' "$tmp/settings.json"; "$office" project-create --project p1 --name 'Project One' >/dev/null; "$office" workflow-start --tenant t1 --deployment d1 --user u1 --role project_manager --project p1 --task 'product requirement design ui prototype code implement frontend' --idempotency-key gui-readiness > "$tmp/workflow.json"; "$office" gui-state --user u1 --project p1 --limit 10 > "$tmp/gui-state.json"; python3 -c 'import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); ids=[item["id"] for item in data["capabilities"]]; assert data["settings"]["configured"] is True; assert "global_settings" in ids and "workflow_control_plane" in ids and "approval_center" in ids; assert data["workflows"]["count"] >= 1 and data["tasks"]["count"] >= 1' "$tmp/gui-state.json"
